text: 4 weeks in, Trump’s conflicting signals on Iran war frustrate GOP lawmakers and political allies - CNN
fullText: President Donald Trump’s conflicting signals over the future of the war in Iran have spurred deepening frustration among GOP lawmakers and allies who fear the administration still lacks a clear endgame after four weeks of fighting.

text: Here's what needs to happen before oil starts flowing through the Strait of Hormuz again - CBS News
fullText: As the U.S.-Iran war nears the one-month mark, the fragile global oil market has emerged as a key weapon in Iran's arsenal — and some shipping and insurance experts don't expect the situation to return to normal until the conflict winds down.

text: Rifts over Iran, but unity for Trump: Takeaways from CPAC 2026 - NPR
fullText: Members of the MAGA faithful gathered in Texas for the annual Conservative Political Action Conference. While tensions over Iran split some attendees, Trump remained the glue holding them together.

text: Stuck in a long TSA line? Here are some strategies if you need to rebook your flight - NPR
fullText: Extreme TSA lines at airports have left many passengers scrambling to rebook flights missed due to delays. But while airlines say they're helping flyers, they're not obligated to do so.

text: The nerve centre running a new mission to the Moon - bbc.com
fullText: Just like the Apollo mission, Artemis II will be run from a mission control monitoring every instrument from here on Earth. How has it changed since the days of the space race?

text: New Cholesterol Guidelines Are Here: Doctors Share the Biggest Changes - aol.com
fullText: New cholesterol guidelines for 2026 update LDL targets, screening age and Lp(a) testing. Learn what’s changed and how it can protect your heart health.

text: Pope Leo visits a tiny, wealthy, devoutly Catholic nation in first foreign trip of 2026 - CNN
fullText: The leaders of the world’s two smallest states came together on Saturday, as Pope Leo XIV made history with the first papal visit to Monaco in modern times.

text: ‘Now we have the proof’: Safety advocates hope a landmark jury ruling could lead to social media changes - CNN
fullText: Online safety advocates hope landmark trial verdicts this week can bring change to social media platforms they have warned about for years, after juries found Meta (and YouTube in one case) responsible for harms to kids and teens.

fullText: The strike on Prince Sultan Air Base also damaged at least two Air Force refueling aircraft and underscored that despite weeks of strikes, Iran still poses a threat.
